name: integration-skills
description: Split monolithic sync skill into focused integration skills

tasks.title: Create enrich_meeting_attendees pattern in PATTERNS.md
tasks.description: Add a new pattern for cross-referencing calendar to fill in missing attendee names. Pattern covers: when to enrich (incomplete names, email-only, first-name-only), how to match (time overlap ±15 min, email domain, title similarity), CLI command (arete pull calendar --json), how to merge info, integration point (process-meetings step 2). Include example workflow steps for skill authors.
acceptanceCriteria: Pattern documented in packages/runtime/skills/PATTERNS.md
Includes example workflow steps for skill authors
Specifies integration point: Apply during process-meetings step 2 (entity resolution)

tasks.title: Create Fathom skill with template
tasks.description: Create packages/runtime/skills/fathom/SKILL.md with proper frontmatter (name: fathom, description, work_type: operations, category: essential, intelligence: [synthesis], triggers for fathom). Document two-stage flow (pull then process-meetings). Reference enrich_meeting_attendees pattern. Create template at packages/runtime/skills/fathom/templates/meeting.md documenting final format after process-meetings.
acceptanceCriteria: Skill file created with proper frontmatter (name, description, work_type, category, intelligence, triggers)
Skill documents two-stage flow: Run process-meetings after pull
Template created matching process-meetings expectations
Template has empty Summary/Action Items sections for Areté generation
Template preserves Fathom raw summary in Fathom Notes section
Skill references enrich_meeting_attendees pattern
Entry added to PATTERNS.md template resolution table

tasks.title: Create Krisp skill with template
tasks.description: Create packages/runtime/skills/krisp/SKILL.md with proper frontmatter (name: krisp, description, work_type: operations, category: essential, intelligence: [synthesis], triggers for krisp). Document two-stage flow. Reference enrich_meeting_attendees pattern. Create template at packages/runtime/skills/krisp/templates/meeting.md with Krisp-specific sections (detailed_summary, key_points, action_items).
acceptanceCriteria: Skill file created with proper frontmatter (name, description, work_type, category, intelligence, triggers)
Skill documents two-stage flow: Run process-meetings after pull
Template includes Krisp-specific sections (key_points, action_items)
Template has empty Summary/Action Items for Areté generation
Skill references enrich_meeting_attendees pattern
Entry added to PATTERNS.md template resolution table

tasks.title: Create Notion and Calendar skills
tasks.description: Create packages/runtime/skills/notion/SKILL.md (check integration status, ask for page URLs, run pull, destination handling, 404/sharing gotcha, no template). Create packages/runtime/skills/calendar/SKILL.md (check provider, run pull/display, no template, triggers scoped to calendar ops not overlapping meeting-prep).
acceptanceCriteria: Notion skill created with proper frontmatter
Notion skill documents 404/sharing gotcha
Calendar skill created with proper frontmatter
Calendar skill triggers dont overlap with meeting-prep
Both skills are focused (under 80 lines each)

tasks.title: Delete sync skill and update references
tasks.description: Delete packages/runtime/skills/sync/ directory. Update packages/runtime/skills/README.md with new skills (fathom, krisp, notion, calendar). Search for and update any cross-references to sync skill. Verify old sync triggers would route appropriately.
acceptanceCriteria: sync/ directory deleted
No broken references to sync skill (grep verified)
README.md updated with new skills
Old sync triggers documented as routing to appropriate new skills
